data.name: Lewis

weaponImprint.name: Toysmith
weaponImprint.trait: If a phase weakness is exploited, ignores 10% of the target's defense. If it is a Burn phase weakness, ignores another 10% of defense.
weaponImprint.effect: Increases Burn damage by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. If 3 or more instances of Burn damage is dealt this turn, Burn damage in the next turn is further increased by 10%/11%/12%/13%/14%/15%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to enemy targets with a Burn debuff is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to the Entropics is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: An innocent and pure-hearted Tactical Doll who also works as a toy designer. Possessing great strength, she has an endless love for all things cute. Famous in the toy collecting world, Lewis doesn’t care for reputation or rewards—only for bringing joy to others and protecting the smiles of children when they hold toys. As a toy designer, she continues to design toys to pass on happiness into the future, and as a Tactical Doll, she wields her weapon to ensure that future arrives.

skills.name: Playtime
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Tin Soldiers on Parade
skills.description:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac|doll:lewis]. Lewis consumes all Confectance Index, then selects the 2 closest allied Burn attributed Dolls (excluding Lewis herself) and attaches 1 Rank I [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] to them.

When units with an attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] deal Burn damage with active skills or basic attacks, Lewis commands the [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] to perform [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] on the damaged target, as well as gaining 3 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and 1 point of Confectance Index. Each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] can trigger this effect once per turn. When such units deal Burn damage, they gain 1 stack of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617]. At the end of the round, these units consume 4 stacks of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617] to increase the [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] level of their attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c]. Rank can be increasd by a maximum of once per round.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac|doll:lewis]. Lewis consumes all Confectance Index, then selects the 2 closest allied Burn attributed Dolls (excluding Lewis herself) and attaches 1 Rank I [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] to them.

When units with an attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] deal Burn damage with active skills or basic attacks, Lewis commands the [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] to perform [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] on the damaged target, as well as gaining 3 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and 1 point of Confectance Index. Each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] can trigger this effect once per turn. When such units deal Burn damage, they gain 1 stack of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617]. At the end of the round, these units consume 4 stacks of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617] to increase the [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] level of their attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c]. Rank can be increasd by a maximum of once per round.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac|doll:lewis]. Lewis consumes all Confectance Index, then selects the 2 closest allied Burn attributed Dolls (excluding Lewis herself) and attaches 1 Rank II [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] to them.

When units with an attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] deal Burn damage with active skills or basic attacks, Lewis commands the [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] to perform [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] on the damaged target, as well as gaining 3 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and 1 point of Confectance Index. Each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] can trigger this effect once per turn. When such units deal Burn damage, they gain 1 stack of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617]. At the end of the round, these units consume 4 stacks of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617] to increase the [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] level of their attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c]. Rank can be increasd by a maximum of once per round.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The base damage multiplier of [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4|doll:lewis] is increased to 120% of attack.

When performing [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4|doll:lewis], if the target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], triggers [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] a number of times equal to its [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289|doll:lewis] level.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
[effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] attached now starts at Rank II.

The effects of [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] are enhanced:

Rank II: Critical damage is increased by 15%.

Rank III: At the end of Lewis' action, performs [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] once on the nearest enemy. This does not count against the maximum number of uses and does not restore Confectance Index.

Dandegate Note: the Rank III Volley Fire is triggered at the end of the holder's action, not Lewis's.

skills.name: Bad Guy Cleanup
skills.description: Selects one direction, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy targets in a 3x5 tile area in front, and applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one direction, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a 3x5 area in front, and applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns. For each Burn debuff on the target, the damage dealt by this attack is increased by 10%, to a maximum increase of 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The damage multiplier is increased to 120%. For each Burn debuff on the target, damage dealt by this attack is increased by 10%, to a maximum increase of 30%.

skills.name: Surprising Funball
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles, deals Burn damage equal to 140% of attack to it, then deals fixed damage equal to 30% of attack to both the target and all enemies within 3 tiles of it. Gain 2 stacks of [effect:b41dd0eb-d3d4-400d-af35-b3a39f157c2e|doll:lewis].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles, deals Burn damage equal to 160% of attack to it, then deals fixed damage equal to 50% of attack to both the target and all enemy targets within 3 tiles of it. Gain [effect:b41dd0eb-d3d4-400d-af35-b3a39f157c2e] for 3 rounds.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The damage multiplier is increased to 160% and the fixed damage multiplier is increased to 50% of attack. The effect of [effect:b41dd0eb-d3d4-400d-af35-b3a39f157c2e|doll:lewis] lasts for 3 rounds, and is changed to increasing the damage of [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4|doll:lewis] by 50%.

skills.name: Toy Carnival
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 180% of attack to it. For each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] on the battlefield, the damage of the attack is increased by (15% x the Rank of that Tin Soldier). In addition, the critical rate of the attack is increased by (5% x the Rank level of that Tin Soldier).
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 180% of attack to it. For each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] on the battlefield, the damage of the attack is increased by (15% x the Rank of that Tin Soldier). In addition, the critical rate of the attack is increased by (5% x the Rank level of that Tin Soldier).

The attack gains additional effects based on the highest Rank level Tin Solider present on the battlefield (Higher ranks include all the effects of lower ranks):

Rank I: Before the attack, gains [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] for 2 turns.

Rank II: The attack now deals Burn damage that ignores cover.

Rank III: The damage multiplier is increased to 200% of attack.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 180% of attack to it. For each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] on the battlefield, the damage multiplier of the attack is increased by (10% of the Rank level of that Tin Soldier), the damage of the attack is increased by (15% x the Rank of that Tin Soldier), and the critical rate of the attack is increased by (5% x the Rank level of that Tin Soldier).

The attack gains additional effects based on the highest Rank level Tin Solider present on the battlefield (Higher ranks include all the effects of lower ranks):

Rank I: Before the attack, gains [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] for 2 turns.

Rank II: The attack now deals Burn damage that ignores cover.

Rank III: The damage multiplier is increased to 200% of attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Confectance Index consumption is reduced by 2 points. The attack gains additional effects based on the highest [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289|doll:lewis] level Tin Solider present on the battlefield (Higher ranks include include all the effects of the lower ranks):

Rank I: Before the attack, gains [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] for 2 turns.

Rank II: The attack now deals Burn damage that ignores cover.

Rank III: The damage multiplier is increased to 200% of attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: For each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] on the battlefield, the damage multiplier of the attack is increased by (10% × the [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] level of that Tin Soldier), and the critical damage of the attack is increased by (5% × the [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] level ot that Tin Soldier).

keys.effect: Ultimate Skill damage is increased by 10%.
Before performing [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4|doll:lewis], Lewis applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the target for 2 turns.

The effects of the passive skill [dollSkill:617ed22d-110b-475a-876b-f6946b9435c2] are changed: it now applies [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] to non-Burn attributed Dolls (excluding Lewis herself). They can still trigger [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] even if their active skills or basic attacks do not deal Burn damage.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Secret of Spreading Smiles

keys.effect: The active skill [dollSkill:e594d5a6-c611-4e4c-b99d-020d6510d09c] and the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:77e63377-4ae8-4855-85f0-b9a09200d143] cleanse 1 buff from target before they resolves.
When attacking a target with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], damage dealt is increased by 15% and Lewis applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] for 2 turns.

At the start of the turn, if there is a [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] on the battlefield with [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289|doll:lewis] greater than or equal to Rank II, the range of the active skill [dollSkill:e594d5a6-c611-4e4c-b99d-020d6510d09c] and the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:77e63377-4ae8-4855-85f0-b9a09200d143] is increased by 2 tiles for the duration of the battle.
Units with Tin Soldiers gain 2 stacks of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617] at the end of their action.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 6 - Guardian From The Cloud

vertebrae.effect:
The base damage multiplier of [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4|doll:lewis] is increased to 120% of attack.

When performing [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4|doll:lewis], if the target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], triggers [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] a number of times equal to its [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289|doll:lewis] level.

skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 180% of attack to it. For each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] on the battlefield, the damage multiplier of the attack is increased by (10% of the Rank level of that Tin Soldier), the damage of the attack is increased by (15% x the Rank of that Tin Soldier), and the critical rate of the attack is increased by (5% x the Rank level of that Tin Soldier).

The attack gains additional effects based on the highest Rank level Tin Solider present on the battlefield (Higher ranks include all the effects of lower ranks):

Rank I: Before the attack, gains [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] for 2 turns.

Rank II: The attack now deals Burn damage that ignores cover.

Rank III: The damage multiplier is increased to 200% of attack.

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] attached now starts at Rank II.

The effects of [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] are enhanced:

Rank II: Critical damage is increased by 15%.

Rank III: At the end of Lewis' action, performs [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] once on the nearest enemy. This does not count against the maximum number of uses and does not restore Confectance Index.

Dandegate Note: the Rank III Volley Fire is triggered at the end of the holder's action, not Lewis's.

doll.name: Lewis
doll.effects: An innocent and pure-hearted Tactical Doll who also works as a toy designer. Possessing great strength, she has an endless love for all things cute. Famous in the toy collecting world, Lewis doesn’t care for reputation or rewards—only for bringing joy to others and protecting the smiles of children when they hold toys. As a toy designer, she continues to design toys to pass on happiness into the future, and as a Tactical Doll, she wields her weapon to ensure that future arrives.

skillsLevel3.name: Tin Soldiers on Parade
skillsLevel3.description:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac|doll:lewis]. Lewis consumes all Confectance Index, then selects the 2 closest allied Burn attributed Dolls (excluding Lewis herself) and attaches 1 Rank I [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c|doll:lewis] to them.

When units with an attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] deal Burn damage with active skills or basic attacks, Lewis commands the [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] to perform [effect:942a63fb-137d-43cb-8307-71645f9d79a4] on the damaged target, as well as gaining 3 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2] and 1 point of Confectance Index. Each [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c] can trigger this effect once per turn. When such units deal Burn damage, they gain 1 stack of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617]. At the end of the round, these units consume 4 stacks of [effect:fb22ea59-387c-49af-b880-715c8a628617] to increase the [effect:8342fdb5-55bd-47b6-b2a1-04b184d2b289] level of their attached [effect:ef73e84e-716c-41c9-a227-85593b33970c]. Rank can be increasd by a maximum of once per round.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Burn debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.
